# kCGImagePropertyGIFHasGlobalColorMap

**Global Variable**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the GIF has a global color map.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyGIFHasGlobalColorMap: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean].

## Image Properties

- **kCGImagePropertyGIFCanvasPixelHeight**: The height of the main image, in pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyGIFCanvasPixelWidth**: The width of the main image, in pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyGIFImageColorMap**: The image color map.
